burberry-beige.name: Burberry Beige
burberry-beige.description: Imported marble with a warm beige tone and soft natural veining. Popular for flooring, wall cladding, and countertops.

red-lavente.name: Red Lavente
red-lavente.description: Red Lavante (also known as Rosso Levanto) is a vibrant, deep-red natural marble featuring striking white or gray veins. It is highly prized for luxury projects like countertops, flooring, and decorative statement walls.
